tasks.label: Initialize Git Repo
tasks.command: git init && git remote add origin https://github.com/Niama001/CozyGames.git && git remote -v

tasks.label: Initialize Git Repo
tasks.command: if (!(Test-Path .git)) { git init }; git remote remove origin 2>$null; git remote add origin https://github.com/Niama001/CozyGames.git; git remote -v
